title: Bureaucratic Representation and State Responsiveness: The 1918 Pandemic in India

original_result.source: Table 2, Column 3 (Town + Year FEs, clustered at district)

notes: Single treatment timing: indian_dm1918=1 towns treated 1918-1919 (post=1). 1061 towns in 205 districts. Clustering at district level (did). SA disabled (single cohort). Event study uses biannual periods in the paper, but our template uses annual. indian_dm1918_post is pre-computed in data.
